commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ac50fcb2099ffb8d7e4cdc707555fea54296175a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI reset slash-command dispatch to forward `/reset` arguments and adds a regression test for `/reset soft ...`.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +28. Total +31 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `parseSlashCommand` preserves `/reset soft ...` args, but the reset dispatch branch sends literal `/reset`; I did not run a live browser because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A contributor or maintainer needs to add real behavior proof and decide whether to require the small token-boundary cleanup; automation should not take over while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve /reset soft args in Control UI dispatch
target.body:
## Summary
- Fix `case "reset":` in `dispatchSlashCommand` to forward `args` instead of hardcoding `/reset`, so `/reset soft [message]` is preserved.
- Fix `isChatResetCommand` to exclude `/reset soft` from the hard-reset confirmation dialog, matching the silent in-place behavior of other channels.
- Add regression test verifying `/reset soft please reload system prompt` skips confirmation and sends the full message.

## Test plan
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts` passes (85/85)
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:core` type-checks cleanly
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` type-checks cleanly
- [x] `pnpm format` produces no changes

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Control UI truncated `/reset soft` to `/reset`, silently archiving the transcript instead of performing a soft reset.
Real environment tested: Linux, Node v22.22.0
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm format`
Evidence after fix: All 85 app-chat tests pass; type-check exits cleanly.
Observed result after fix: `/reset soft` no longer triggers the hard-reset confirmation dialog and the full message including args is dispatched to the Gateway.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` (requires remote Crabbox/Testbox); Control UI live browser verification.

Fixes #91316
target.author: zhouhe-xydt
